creator: cyberbotx@cyberbotx.com
text:
Created attachment 238405
libuninameslist-20221022.patch

* Update to 20221022
* Remove MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE from Makefile (it seems the problem of JOBS failing on i386 from a couple years ago no longer happens)
* Cleanup Makefile (used portclippy)
* Update distinfo
* Update pkg-plist

Changelog: https://github.com/fontforge/libuninameslist/releases/tag/20221022

Tested via poudriere for 13.1-amd64, 13.1-i386, 12.3-amd64 and 12.3-i386. Passes portlist (even though it erroneously complains about the URL in pkg-descr).
